## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Browser** (if frontend): Chrome / Firefox / Safari
- **OS**: macOS / Linux / Windows
- **Python version**: 3.11.x
- **Node version**: 20.x

## Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, add error logs or screenshots.
